intentSynonyms: get a contribution data in fidelity
look up a contribution data in fidelity

view ira/hsa contribution limits and ytd in fidelity
description: Get IRA and HSA contribution limits, year-to-date contributions, and catch-up eligibility for retirement accounts. Shows both current and prior year data.

account_number.description: Account number for the retirement account
